title: Seafood Pasta
description: A light and flavorful Italian-inspired dish featuring seafood and pasta.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Cook the linguine according to package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat. Add the garlic and sauté for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the shrimp and mussels to the skillet. Cook for 2-3 minutes until the shrimp turn pink and the mussels open.
Add the lemon juice to the skillet and toss to combine. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Add the cooked linguine to the skillet and toss to combine with the seafood and sauce.
Optional: add some xtra grated Parmesan cheese on top for extra flavor.
